prompt:
Ultra-realistic cinematic street-fashion editorial, candid documentary aesthetic. A handsome man with messy wind-blown hair wearing an oversized black hoodie walks through a busy urban street with a calm, introspective expression and eyes looking downward. Natural relaxed posture, effortless luxury streetwear styling.

Asymmetrical composition with generous negative space, layered city depth, blurred passing vehicles creating natural motion streaks and subtle foreground occlusion. Captured during an overcast golden afternoon with soft diffused daylight, gentle atmospheric haze, realistic reflections, and delicate rim light separating the subject from the background.

Shot on a full-frame cinema camera using an 85mm lens at f/1.8, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh, subtle film grain, organic motion blur, Kodak Portra 400 color science, muted monochromatic palette of charcoal, black, and cool gray tones. Premium Vogue × GQ editorial photography, cinematic realism, authentic skin texture, realistic fabric folds, understated emotion, luxury minimalist fashion campaign, masterpiece quality, no text, no watermark.
